description.english: Have 10 relatives employed simultaneously on taxpayer money.
Employ three siblings of a colleague at the same time.
description.german: Drei Geschwister eines Kollegen gleichzeitig einstellen.

description.english: Have 16 employees working simultaneously.
Be involved in a scandal you previously criticized others for.
description.german: Selbst in Skandal verwickelt sein, den man bei anderen kritisiert hat.

description.english: Bring an entire state party chapter under your control.
Provide for your first family member with taxpayer money.
Employ 5 family members simultaneously.
Hire and fire 10 different employees during the game.
description.german: 10 verschiedene Mitarbeiter im Laufe des Spiels einstellen und entlassen.

description.english: Not a single legal financial move in the entire game.
description.german: Keinen einzigen legalen Finanz-Move im ganzen Spiel.

description.english: Trigger a 7 million euro fine and survive politically.
description.german: Strafgeld von 7 Mio. € auslösen und politisch überleben.

description.english: Have 5 different front men active simultaneously.
Receive a free Twitter interview.
Accept your first cash payment.
Accumulate over 100,000 € in slush funds.
Open a numbered account in Switzerland.
description.german: Ein Nummernkonto in der Schweiz eröffnen.

description.english: Launder money for the first time.
Successfully launder 500,000 €.
Maintain three offshore accounts simultaneously.
Have BND, BKA, and Austrian BKA investigating simultaneously.
description.german: BND + BKA + österreichisches BKA gleichzeitig ermitteln.

description.english: Forward information from a parliamentary inquiry to the Kremlin.
description.german: Info aus Kleiner Anfrage an Kreml weiterleiten.

description.english: Secret trip to Russia without media attention.
Legitimize a Russian sham election as an
First diplomatic trip to Hungary.
Complete 5 different Russia-related actions.
Maximize your Russia relationship.
Unlock all Hungary tech nodes.
Complete your first action in the EU Parliament.
Establish your first China connection.
Unlock all China tech nodes.
Maximize Russia, China, and Hungary relations simultaneously.
description.german: Russland-, China- und Ungarn-Beziehungen gleichzeitig maximal.

description.english: File 47+ inquiries on security topics in a single year.
description.german: 47+ Anfragen zu Sicherheitsthemen in einem Jahr.

description.english: File your first inquiry that gets classified as confidential.
description.german: Erste Anfrage, die als Verschlusssache eingestuft wird.

description.english: Cram 50+ questions into a single parliamentary inquiry.
description.german: 50+ Fragen in einer einzigen Kleinen Anfrage.

displayName.english: Inception — I'm No Spy, and I Have the Inquiry to Prove It!
displayName.german: „Inception — Ich bin kein Spion, und ich hab die Anfrage, die es beweist!

description.english: File an inquiry about the espionage suspicion caused by your own inquiries.
description.german: Anfrage über den Spionageverdacht der eigenen Anfragen stellen.

description.english: File 100 inquiries without a single investigation.
File your first parliamentary inquiry.
File 25 parliamentary inquiries.
File 50 parliamentary inquiries.
Escalate a scandal so far that nobody can mediate anymore.
description.german: Einen Skandal so groß machen, dass niemand mehr schlichten kann.

description.english: Survive a Correctiv investigation without taking damage.
Be absent during a parliamentary topical debate.
description.german: Während einer Aktuellen Stunde nicht anwesend sein.

description.english: Appear in the media for the first time.
description.german: Zum ersten Mal in den Medien erscheinen.

description.english: Survive a shitstorm without taking damage.
Experience 20 different events.
Survive 5 scandals without consequences.
Keep a scandal running for 5 rounds.
description.german: Einen Skandal über 5 Runden am Laufen halten.

description.english: Get rid of criminal proceedings for a pittance.
Visit Disneyland Paris on the taxpayer's dime.
Complete all 5 lifestyle tiers.
Make your son-in-law a millionaire through government contracts.
description.german: Schwiegersohn zum Millionär durch Staatsaufträge machen.

description.english: Accumulate 10,000 €.
Accumulate 50,000 €.
Accumulate 100,000 €.
Accumulate 500,000 €.
Accumulate 1,000,000 €.
Accumulate 5,000,000 €.
Accumulate 10,000,000 €.
Reach lifestyle tier 4.
Survive 20 rounds without upgrading lifestyle.
Reach power level 50 within 10 rounds.
Take your seat as a new parliamentarian for the first time.
description.german: Als neuer Abgeordneter das erste Mal Platz nehmen.

description.english: Secure a state parliament seat.
Get elected to the Bundestag.
Rise to faction leadership.
Become the opposition leader.
Have 50 contacts in your network simultaneously.
Maximize your network level.
Reach power level 100.
Survive 20 rounds as a politician.
Stay in office for 50 rounds.
Survive 100 rounds in office.
Add your first contact to the network.
Have 10 contacts in your network simultaneously.
Have 25 contacts in your network simultaneously.
Reach at least level 3 in all 6 tech trees.
description.german: In allen 6 Tech-Bäumen mindestens Level 3 erreichen.

description.english: Get placed under domestic intelligence surveillance for the first time.
description.german: Zum ersten Mal vom Verfassungsschutz beobachtet werden.

description.english: Be classified as a suspected case.
Be classified as a confirmed extremist.
Survive a party ban attempt.
Face criminal charges for the first time.
description.german: Zum ersten Mal strafrechtlich verfolgt werden.

description.english: Block 3 proceedings simultaneously through immunity.
Receive 10 different proceedings during the game.
description.german: 10 verschiedene Verfahren im Laufe des Spiels erhalten.

description.english: Be involved in all proceeding types simultaneously.
description.german: In allen Verfahrenstypen gleichzeitig verwickelt sein.

description.english: Survive 10 rounds without a scandal.
Have all 6 end-techs unlocked simultaneously.
Survive 5 rounds.
Complete one full legislative period (~16 rounds).
Survive 75 rounds.
Almost lose the game and make a comeback.
description.german: Kurz vor dem Spielende stehen und zurückkommen.

description.english: Survive a round with less than 10% stability.
description.german: Mit weniger als 10% Stabilität eine Runde überleben.

description.english: Kubitschek publicly criticizes you (his own coined term).
Use every corruption mechanic at least once.
Discover and neutralize an informant in your network.
description.german: Einen V-Mann in deinem Netzwerk entdecken und ausschalten.

description.english: Be accused of corruption in the Bundestag and survive.
description.german: Im Bundestag der Korruption beschuldigt werden und überleben.

description.english: Lose the game for the first time.
description.german: Zum ersten Mal das Spiel verlieren.

description.english: Win the game without a single criminal proceeding.
description.german: Das Spiel ohne ein einziges Verfahren gewinnen.

description.english: Unlock 10 different technologies.
Unlock 30 different technologies.
Use all 8 action categories in a single round.
description.german: In einer Runde alle 8 Aktionskategorien nutzen.

description.english: Reach corruption index 50 in under 10 rounds.
